'''Lightning Battalion''' was a special forces team of the [[Imperial Army/Legends|Imperial Army]] [[Icarii Campaign|fighting]] against the [[Icarii]] on [[Vestar/Legends|Vestar]]. They wore nonstandard blue uniforms with a lightning bolt insignia. The battalion was responsible for the capture of Icarii sorceress [[Selestrine]]. Upon discovering her precognitive abilities, [[Colonel/Legends|Colonel]] [[Abal Karda]] murdered [[General/Legends|General]] [[Nim]] and deserted the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] with Selestrine's severed head.
